quality_notes: Generated as the interrupt/control/command symbol character (orc-iron-commander): blackened iron armor, horned helmet, red cape, generic heavy war hammer; danger red and iron gray accents.
IP-safe: generic war hammer silhouette, no faction emblem, no logo, not based on any existing game character.
Initial 8-direction batches were generated cleanly; the stale and error north-east directions were then re-rolled because the first results showed a walking gait.

stale north-east is now in folder animations/stationary_stale_idle_loop_seen_from_a_rear_three-/north-east; error north-east is now in folder animations/stationary_error_alert_loop_seen_from_a_rear_three/north-east; the original folders keep the other 7 directions.

Visual QA passed: stale and error keep both feet planted with no walking or falling (north-east verified after re-roll); roaming shows alternating leg motion in all 8 directions; error shows the red warning flash.
stale and error use standing status loops; falling-back-death is deprecated and intentionally not mapped in manifest.
